purpose: Demonstrate the E1 intake-to-goal-spec contract and the E3 improvement-to-plan update contract.
background: Updated from improvement-handoff.json after C04 and C05 pass markers were generated.
goal: The updated plan records source_improvement and routes back to build without losing source_intake.

checklist.criterion: The update keeps the original source_intake provenance.
The update records source_improvement provenance and carries validation_commands forward.

constraints: C11 must block --mode update when C04/C05 pass markers are missing or stale.
